questions.question: A customer wants to buy products online. Derive the functional requirement that is related to the payment process. Explain how it can be implemented using a programming language.

A software application is required to process transactions for a bank. Derive the nonfunctional requirement related to security. Explain the importance of this requirement and how it can be implemented using a programming language.

A company wants to develop a mobile application for its employees to track their work hours. Derive both the functional and nonfunctional requirements related to user interface. Explain how they can be implemented using a programming language and how they impact the overall quality of the application.
